howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.description: BoltCall transforms how you capture and convert leads. Our AI-powered system works 24/7 to ensure you never miss an opportunity, responding instantly to every inquiry and booking qualified appointments automatically.

receptionist.title: AI Receptionist
receptionist.description: Your AI receptionist answers calls 24/7, qualifies leads, and schedules appointments automatically.

adsReplies.title: Instant Ads Replies
adsReplies.description: Respond to ads instantly with personalized messages that convert visitors into qualified leads.

smsBooking.title: SMS Booking
smsBooking.description: Convert SMS inquiries into booked appointments with automated scheduling and reminders.

items.a: Boltcall is an AI receptionist that answers your calls 24/7, books appointments, captures leads, sends follow-up texts, and reminds customers about upcoming visits. It works even when you're busy or closed.

items.q: Can it transfer calls to a real person?
items.a: Yes. You set the rules — transfer during business hours, for VIP customers, or urgent calls. If no one picks up, it takes a message and books a callback.

items.q: Does it sound like a real person?
items.a: Yes. You choose the voice and tone — friendly, calm, or professional. Callers often can't tell it's AI.

items.q: Can I keep my current phone number?
items.a: Yes. You can forward your existing number to Boltcall, or get a new local number in the app.
About 5 minutes. Enter your business details, pick a voice, and your AI receptionist is live. No technical skills needed.

items.q: Does it connect to my CRM or calendar?
items.a: Yes. Boltcall integrates with HubSpot, Google Sheets, Zapier, Cal.com, and more. Every lead and booking syncs automatically to the tools you already use.
